shot.start: Scrap yard, daylight; a large dusty tractor tyre lies flat; a weathered male hand enters frame
shot.action: the hand tips the tyre upright; dust puffs once
shot.end: tyre standing upright, hand resting on top, holding still

scenes.negatives: no other people, no camera cut, no text, no zoom
scenes.ambient: faint yard wind, one soft tyre thud

shot.start: Raju (Indian man ~30, off-white kurta, red-checked gamchha) stands beside the upright tyre, neutral face
shot.action: he turns his head slightly toward off-screen left, then back to camera with a faint half-smile
shot.end: eyes on camera, half-smile held, body still

scenes.negatives: no one else visible in frame, no cut, no text

shot.start: Workshop bench; tyre rim partially converted into a round trough; hands holding a hammer at the rim
shot.action: two hammer taps seating a nail
shot.end: hammer resting on rim, nail seated, hands still

scenes.negatives: no face in frame, no cut, no text, no extra tools appearing

shot.start: Sunlit dirt yard; a neat row of four finished tyre-troughs; Raju carries a fifth
shot.action: he sets the fifth trough down at the end of the row
shot.end: he straightens up beside the row, hands on hips, facing camera

scenes.negatives: no other people, no animals, no cut, no text

shot.start: Night, simple village room; Raju sits on a woven cot, face lit only by phone glow, scrolling
shot.action: he stops scrolling and lowers the phone to his lap, exhaling
shot.end: phone on lap, face down-lit, jaw tight, motionless

scenes.negatives: no lights turning on, no other people, no cut, no on-screen content visible
scenes.ambient: quiet room tone, single cricket, very low

shot.start: Close-up, Raju's hand holding a smartphone filling frame, screen plain bright white, thumb hovering
shot.action: thumb taps the blank white screen once
shot.end: thumb resting on screen edge, phone steady

scenes.negatives: no interface, no text, no logos on screen, no second hand, no cut

shot.start: Daylight at a low fence; Raju on one side holding a finished trough; older farmer in white dhoti on the other
shot.action: the trough passes over the fence; the farmer presses folded currency notes into Raju's free palm
shot.end: Raju's fist closed around the notes, both men still, trough in farmer's hands

scenes.negatives: no additional people, no cut, no text, faces calm not exaggerated

shot.start: Village market; Raju stands tall at a stall stacked with tyre-troughs; two buyers inspect one
shot.end: proud upright stance, buyers mid-inspection, frozen beat

scenes.negatives: no crowd surge, no cut, no text, no vehicles

shot.start: Chest-up at the stall, golden hour; Raju arms crossed, slight proud smile, eyes to camera

scenes.negatives: no background people approaching camera, no cut, no text in frame

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: ये फेंका हुआ टायर?... इसमें महीने के 60,000 रुपये छुपे हैं।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: टायर — सिर्फ़ 120 का। नांद बनके बिकता है 600 में।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: दिन के पाँच बनाओ... हिसाब ख़ुद जोड़ लो।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: यूट्यूब देखा... बस यही ग़लती हो गयी।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: फिर सीखो ऐप की बिज़नेस आइडियाज़ कैटेगरी मिली — स्टेप बाय स्टेप... सिर्फ़ 1 रुपये के ट्रायल में।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: आज? महीने के 70 हज़ार... लोग अब कारीगर बोलते हैं।

vo.speaker: RAJU
vo.line: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो — और सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो।
